chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 825 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2018. Mr. Muhammad Shafique Khan Advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w PI Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad & ASI Lachmandas P.S.Airport Hyderabad -=-=- Petitioner Mst. Reema alongwith her husband Muhammad Irfan are present Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner Mst. Reema had left the house of her parents and entered into wedlock with Irfan s/o Ghulam Muhammad on 12.4.2016. Thereafter the brother of petitioner namely Raja s/o Rasool Bukhsh has registered a false FIR under crime No.81 of 2016 at police station Airport U/s 365-B, 34 PPC. Against petitioner’s husband and his relative. It is stated by learned counsel that petitioner has not been abducted or kidnapped by anybody. Petitioner Mst. Reema alongwith her husband Irfan is present and submits that she is living happily with her husband. She further submits that nobody has abducted or kidnapped her and she voluntarily married according to her will and wish. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits since petitioner has not been abducted or kidnapped by anyone else, therefore, said FIR may be quashed. In the circumstances, official respondents are directed to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner as well as her husband. The Investigating Officer of the case is directed to record the statement of Mst. Reema in the office of Learned Asstt:A.G, its copy be submitted to the learned trial court for passing appropriate order in accordance with law, however, no person nominated in the said FIR shall be arrested, till passing the order by the trial court.

The Investigating Officer of the case is directed to record the statement of Mst. Reema in the office of Learned Asstt:A.G, its copy be submitted to the learned trial court for passing appropriate order in accordance with law, however, no person nominated in the said FIR shall be arrested, till passing the order by the trial court. Since very purpose of filing of this petition has been served, therefore, this petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
